steps.title: Compute the y-intercept
steps.content: $f(0)=-\tfrac{1}{6}$, so the intercept is $(0,-\tfrac{1}{6})$. That confirms A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above confirms A, $(0,-\frac{1}{6})$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
